message:
feat(telemetry): Cx-first run loop for TelemetryCollector (ft-xbnl0.2.2)

Add TelemetryCollector::run_cx so the collection loop binds its
inter-sample sleep and cancellation to an explicit &Cx. Uses
sleep_with_cx for virtual-time friendliness plus cx.checkpoint() at
each iteration to honor Cx cancellation independently of the shutdown
AtomicBool. Existing run() delegates under asupersync-runtime; non-
asupersync fallback goes through run_inner. LabRuntime deterministic
test: seed 0x7E1E_7E7E_C410_3100, pre-signals shutdown, asserts
loop exit in <2s wall-clock. 290/290 telemetry tests pass, clippy
clean, default features check pass, ft-xbnl0.2.6 gate passes.
Fifth file in the ft-xbnl0.2.2 Cx-first lane.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
